auth.name: Name
auth.linkIntro: Enter your email. We'll send you a link to sign in, or to create an account if you don't have one yet.
auth.linkSentBody: We sent a link to {email}. Open it to sign in or to create your account. The link works once and expires in 30 minutes.
auth.linkExpired: This link is invalid or has already been used.
auth.loginFailed: Couldn't sign in. Please try again.
auth.completeBody: Enter your name to create your account. An admin still needs to approve you before you can create events.
auth.completeFailed: Couldn't create your account. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Events
dashboard.intro: Create a new event, or open an existing one to see who's signing up.
dashboard.pendingBody: An admin still needs to approve your account before you can create events. Reach out to an existing admin if it's taking a while.
dashboard.noChaptersBody: Your account isn't a member of any chapter yet. Pick the chapters you're active in to get started.
dashboard.archiveConfirmBody: "{name}" will disappear from the list and the public link will stop working. Restore it from the archive at any time.

archived.title: Archive
archived.intro: Archived events. Open an event by restoring it.
archived.noMatches: No archived events match your search.
archived.deleteConfirmBody: {name} and every sign-up / feedback response attached to it will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

admin.usersIntro: Click the pencil to edit a user's name, chapters, or admin role.
admin.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or chapter
admin.approveDialogBody: Check the name and pick a chapter. {name} will then be able to organise events for that chapter.
admin.userEditDialogBody: Change this user's display name or chapter.
admin.deleteUserConfirmBody: {name} will lose access immediately. Re-registering with the same email needs admin approval again.

chapters.title: Chapters
chapters.intro: Local chapters. Events are scoped to a chapter; users only see events from their own chapter.
chapters.addPlaceholder: Type the name of a new chapter and press Enter
chapters.editDialogBody: The chapter's home city is used to bias address suggestions when organisers create events here.
chapters.archiveConfirmBody: {name} will be hidden. Events stay linked; restoring brings them back into view.
chapters.deleteDialogBody: Optionally reassign users or events to another chapter.
chapters.deleteNoDeps: No users or events are linked to this chapter.

event.name: Event name
event.reminderToggle: Send a reminder before the event
event.reminderHelp: Attendees who leave their email get a short reminder about 3 days before the event starts.
event.questionnaireToggle: Send a questionnaire after the event
event.questionnaireHelp: Attendees who leave their email get a short questionnaire shortly after the event.
event.sourcesExplainer: These options will appear on the public sign-up form.
event.localeExplainer: The language of the public sign-up page and the post-event feedback email.
event.helpExplainer: Optional. Sign-ups can tick the tasks they want to help with. Leave the list empty to hide the question.
event.endAfterStart: End time must be after the start time
event.fillSources: Add at least one sign-up source option

deleteSignup.title: Delete sign-up
deleteSignup.confirmBody: Remove the sign-up from "{name}". Headcount and stats update immediately. Any reminder or feedback email already queued for this address will still be sent — sign-ups and outbound emails aren't linked, by design.

reminder.title: Reminder delivery
reminder.explainer: @:appName normally sends the reminder about three days before the event. The button below sends it now to every sign-up still waiting.

feedback.title: Feedback delivery
feedback.explainer: @:appName normally sends the feedback email one day after the event ends. The button below sends it now to every sign-up still waiting.

sendNow.disabledOff: This channel is turned off for this event, so no emails are sent.
sendNow.disabledNothingPending: All emails have already been sent, or no sign-ups are waiting.
sendNow.confirmBody: Send to {n} sign-up(s)? Once sent, emails can't be sent again.
sendNow.successBody: {n} message(s) handed off to the mail server.

public.archived: This event has been archived. Sign-ups are no longer accepted.
public.thanksBody: See you then! If you left an email, you'll get one short feedback question the day after the event. After that we delete your address.
public.explainerIntro: We only ask for what we need. Your name can be a pseudonym — it just helps us with the head count.
public.explainerEmailIntro: Your email is optional. If you leave it, we store it encrypted and use it for:
public.explainerEmailOutro: Once every email related to this event has been sent, we permanently delete your address.
public.explainerNoEmail: We're not asking for any contact details for this event.
public.explainerSource: The full source code of this app is

emailUses.reminder: One reminder about 3 days before the event starts.
emailUses.feedback: One short feedback message shortly after the event.

emailFor.reminderAndFeedback: Email (for one reminder + one feedback message)
emailFor.reminderOnly: Email (for one reminder before the event)

feedback.title: How was {name}?
feedback.intro: Five quick questions, two minutes. The first three are necessary; the rest you can skip.
feedback.thanksBody: We use your answers to make the next event better. Your email address was deleted right after we sent this message.
feedback.expired: This feedback link is no longer valid.

q2_recommend.prompt: Would you recommend this to a comrade?

reminder.sent: The mail server accepted the reminder.
reminder.pending: The signup left an email but the reminder hasn't been sent yet (it runs hourly, in the 72h before the event starts).
reminder.failed: The worker couldn't decrypt the address or the SMTP send threw twice. The encrypted address is wiped either way.
reminder.not_applicable: The signup didn't supply an email, or the reminder was off for this event.

feedback.sent: The mail server accepted the feedback email.
feedback.pending: The signup left an email but the feedback hasn't been sent yet (it runs hourly, ≥24h after the event ends).
feedback.failed: The worker couldn't decrypt the address or the SMTP send threw twice. The encrypted address is wiped either way.
feedback.not_applicable: The signup didn't supply an email, or the questionnaire was off for this event.
